label_verbatim: (Exact Legal Name of Entity on the records of the Secretary of State)
rationale: Exact legal name as on SOS record. Same convention as CLKRA-3, FICT-4, and other shared multi-entity forms.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The entity intends to transact business under the assumed name of:
rationale: The DBA being registered. Subject to entity-type-specific naming statutes (e.g., a corporation's assumed name still cannot conflict with another registered name under 13-C §401).

label_verbatim: SECOND: If the assumed name is not to be used at all the places of business in Maine, the location(s) where it will be used is (are):
rationale: Free-text list of Maine locations where the assumed name will be used. Conditional: only required if the DBA is location-restricted; otherwise it is used at all places of business and this field may be left blank.

label_verbatim: Additional locations are attached hereto as Exhibit ___ and made a part hereof.
rationale: Boolean opt-in for an attached locations exhibit. Mirrors the additional-{incorporators,GPs}-exhibit pattern across the corpus.

label_verbatim: THIRD: (Foreign Entities Only) Jurisdiction of incorporation/organization
rationale: Foreign entity's home state/country. Same key family as CLKRA-3, MBCA-12, MLLC-12, FICT-4.

widget_id: date authorized ro transact business in maine
label_verbatim: and the date on which the entity was authorized to transact business in Maine
rationale: Date the foreign entity originally qualified in Maine. Same key as CLKRA-3.
Signer printed name. Shape A (split name + title) — paired with 'title of signer' below.
Signer title (e.g., 'President', 'Manager', 'General Partner'). Allowed values constrained by the entity-type-specific signature footnotes (*1) through (*5).

widget_id: If signing partner or general partner is an entity name of entity 1
label_verbatim: LIMITED PARTNERSHIPS AND LIMITED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIPS (only if applicable) If signing partner or general partner is an entity, name of entity:
rationale: When an LP/LLP signing partner is itself an entity, captures that entity's name. Same canonical key as CLKRA-3 Text16 ('filing.signer_partner_entity_name'). Used only when filing.signer.title indicates a partner role and the signer-of-record is an entity rather than a natural person.
